prose:
**Frontier‐orbital gap of benzene** — DFT single‐point, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting), on the user-supplied benzene.xyz geometry (no re-optimization), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Software: PySCF (via chemkit frontier-orbitals). SCF converged in 8 cycles; no warnings reported. HOMO = −7.0468329 eV, LUMO = −0.41574728 eV → gap = 6.6310857 eV. Calculation was logged live to  
/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/argo_o4-mini/20260703-230343_benzene_frontier_orbitals/frontier_20260703-230409.out.

Command:
`cli.py frontier /home/erobles/.../benzene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 --out benzene_fo.json`

provenance=computed
